name: ProGen2 Finetuning
description: The pre-trained protein language model ProGen2 can be effectively fine-tuned for controllable generation of protein sequences from several distinct protein families.
capabilities: The pre-trained protein language model ProGen2 can be effectively fine-tuned for controllable generation of protein sequences from several distinct protein families.

training_data.description: FASTA file containing protein sequences from a target family for finetuning

sequence.description: Seed protein sequence for conditional generation after finetuning
